title: VeloraOS 1.9.2 - Header Branding Hotfix
releaseNotes: Uses the VLOS wordmark as the sole brand element in the main header.
Removes the duplicate VeloraOS text and local-appliance tagline from the header.
Keeps installed-only Chat model selection and all v1.9.1 behaviour unchanged.
Preserves users, chats, settings, avatars, models, licensing files and device identity.
